title: When your vehicle outlives its cloud: What happens next?
excerpt: Automakers love connected vehicles, but support isn't open-ended.
content_html:
☁️🚗

Automakers love connected vehicles, but support isn’t open-ended.

Credit: Aurich Lawson | Getty Images

Credit: Aurich Lawson | Getty Images

Do you use your vehicle’s app to pre‑cool the cabin on a scorching day, confirm the doors are locked from bed, or have the car automatically call for help when the airbags go off?

Savor those connected, cloud‑based conveniences while you can—the clock is already ticking on their obsolescence. In a few short years, you may be driving today’s vehicle without many of the features you currently enjoy.

How we got hooked on the cloud

“Connected services”—cloud-based and networked features that let a vehicle communicate with external systems to deliver apps, data, and remote functions to drivers and passengers—have been around since the 1990s, when GM introduced OnStar as an option. Those early systems were mostly voice‑centric, but they still depended on centralized back‑end systems. Modern versions, which are fully data-driven and cloud-hosted, use much more sophisticated over-the-air data links to allow a considerably better feature set.

Today, virtually every volume brand offers some form of cloud-based telematics or a connected services stack. They can be deeply embedded, and most are fully integrated as the core of modern vehicle connectivity, supporting over-the-air (OTA) updates for the vehicle and app-based services for owners. As GM’s OnStar celebrates more than 30 years of service, a dozen others have joined, with each automaker branding its own unique services. HondaLink, Lexus Enform, FordPass, BMW ConnectedDrive, Volvo On Call, and Porsche Connect are just a few.

Despite their catchy marketing names, the systems are all functionally similar—each offers a very comparable feature set. Basics include remote lock/start, vehicle status and maintenance updates, location and tracking, and emergency assistance. Additional premium features include in-vehicle Wi-Fi hotspots, cabin preconditioning, stolen-vehicle tracking services, and concierge owner services.

Plenty of consumers have embraced the remote conveniences and demonstrated to automakers that they are more than willing to pay for them. After a bundled “free trial” following new vehicle delivery, manufacturers charge monthly fees or subscriptions for connected services. GM said that 40 percent of OnStar customers choose to renew their subscriptions after the introductory period expired.

Why automakers love a connected car

Of course, the OEMs get something out of it, too. Cloud-based services allow manufacturers to perform OTA software updates, eliminating the need to pay dealers for labor-intensive warranty repairs such as software-related safety recalls, bug fixes, and powertrain calibration errors. Instead of repairing one vehicle at a time, automakers can push updates to thousands of vehicles simultaneously. Plus, they can offer “product improvements” to owners, including UX changes, ADAS refinements, and new software versions for infotainment apps long after the start of production.

Vehicles require unique hardware for OTA and connected services, of course. The basic components of original equipment (OE) hardware in most passenger vehicles include a telematics box (TCU) with a 3G/4G/5G modem, a SIM/eSIM, and antennas—these comprise the “smartphone” component. There’s also a main onboard computer with flash memory and a boot system to install the new hardware (programmed to revert to early code if something goes wrong so the car doesn’t “brick” itself).

The TCU/main computer is tasked with sending signals over the vehicle’s internal wiring (CAN/Ethernet) to various ECUs, which are engineered to accept updates. For everyone’s peace of mind, robust security measures must be put in place to ensure that only genuine factory software can be installed and that hackers are locked out.

Subscription costs aside, consumers are generally pleased with cloud-based services. Connectivity improves convenience, comfort, and safety, while OTA updates keep vehicles feeling fresh and up to date. Unfortunately, that honeymoon phase doesn’t last forever—over time, vehicle-cloud-based connected services are scaled back or, worse, shut off entirely.

The day the signal dies

There is no single event or element that triggers the end—it’s a combination of things. As vehicles age, OE on-board hardware becomes obsolete as cellular providers replace older technology and automakers stop investing in aging back-end stacks and features. Manufacturer contracts for connected services can also expire. Taken together, these factors mean that time ultimately kills cloud-based vehicle services.

In 2022, many US cellular carriers, including AT&T, T‑Mobile/Sprint, and Verizon, shut down their 3G networks to create system capacity for upcoming 4G and 5G rollouts. When the 3G signal finally ceased, vehicles with the technology lost their connected cloud-based services (Porsche, Nissan, and Volkswagen were just a few of the automakers affected).

Lexus owners felt this shift acutely. The company’s Enform connectivity, which relied on the 3G network and was fitted to nearly all 2010–2017 models, went dark overnight because the hardware simply wasn’t forward‑compatible. (Lexus refunded owners for paid time left, while opportunistic dealers suggested that frustrated owners upgrade to a new Lexus that supported current technology.)

Last year, Acura announced that it would stop supporting vehicles with the older AcuraLink-backed stack and feature set, eliminating app-based remote access, service reminders, lock/unlock capabilities, “Find My Car,” and emergency call functions for many owners. The announcement itself was unremarkable, but many were stunned to learn that the technology was fitted to 2014–2022 models, including cars with current 4G hardware.

Even though the vehicles and their modems could connect, Acura chose to stop supporting the old AcuraLink backend stack and feature set because the company determined it wasn’t worth it. Obsolescence was not an issue. (Acura provided prorated refunds to the relatively small number of customers still on paid plans but offered no retrofit path or migration for those vehicles that lost services.)

In early 2022, BMW ended ConnectedDrive/BMW Assist services for vehicles equipped with 3G telematics. As the end date neared, owners were not permitted to renew their contracts. That February, when the official stop date arrived, all 3G services were terminated, even for those with vehicle connectivity that functioned perfectly. (BMW provided selected owners with other complimentary services; some vehicles with 4G-capable telematics were offered an upgrade at no charge, but many simply lost connectivity altogether.)

Life after the shutdown

When cloud-based connectivity goes away, it’s more of an inconvenience than a disaster. While remote conveniences and safety services end, they don’t serve an important role in the vehicle’s daily mechanical operation, meaning the powertrain, climate control, and accessories continue to work.

But what if you use those cloud-based features and need an alternative once the existing system shuts off? Thankfully, there are a handful of possibilities, including software/OTA updates, hardware/TCU replacements, aftermarket telematics and OBD devices, and smartphone apps to keep vehicles connected to the cloud.

Software/OTA updates are the easiest path to restore cloud services, but that assumes the vehicle has the proper hardware installed. Some 2017–2019 Genesis vehicles, including G80 and G90 models, used an SVLTE-type telematics system that could be upgraded with new software (the pure 3G-only units lost services when Verizon dropped its 3G network). Honda offered many customers free over-the-air software upgrades to 4G LTE in advance of AT&T’s cutoff. And GM brand owners, including those with Buick, Cadillac, Chevrolet, and GMC vehicles, were offered over-the-air software updates that preserved core OnStar services even after the first 3G network ceased.

Things are a bit more complicated with hardware upgrades, as swapping out the physical telematics control unit typically requires a visit to the dealership. Many 2016–2018 Subaru models equipped with the brand’s Starlink Safety & Security required a new 4G network telematics Starlink data communication module (DCM) to keep cloud-based services running (the remedy was offered at no charge to eligible subscribers).

Nissan offered a $199 2G‑to‑3G TCU upgrade, which was partially subsidized by the manufacturer, for many 2011–2014 Leaf models but then offered the same upgrade to 2015 Leaf owners for free. BMW told i3 owners that no official technology upgrade was available, so owners took matters into their own hands and bought up-to-date 4G TCUs and paid to have them coded—this cost upward of $1,400 per vehicle.

Although less integrated with the vehicle’s systems, aftermarket telematics and diagnostic-port (OBD) solutions offer limited cloud connectivity to fill the gap left by OE services when they’re phased out. Unfortunately, most are engineered for fleet services—creating app-based trip logs, GPS tracking, driving-style scoring, and basic OBD fault-code data for remote monitoring and data logging. They’re effective in this role, but they generally can’t duplicate OEM functions such as remote lock/engine start, automatic crash notification, or SOS features because they sit on the OBD port rather than on the carmaker’s proprietary telematics stack.

When cloud-based connectivity services disappear, those who can’t update via software or hardware (or simply don’t want to pay subscription and fee costs) often adopt a simple handheld solution—they rely on their smartphone. Apple CarPlay and Android Auto have been cleanly integrated into nearly all the OE infotainment systems on the market for the past decade. Consumer acceptance is high, as the interactive screens duplicate smartphone interfaces, keeping the UI effortless. There are also regular OTA updates via the mobile subscribers’ 4G/5G service.

While remote lock/engine start and climate control preconditioning typically aren’t part of the Apple CarPlay and Android Auto equation, most smartphones offer some sort of crash‑detection and SOS functions, reincorporating some of the important safety features lost with OEM cloud-based systems. Mobile phones also offer Wi-Fi via mobile hotspots, adding another useful feature. Phone-driven connectivity, with cloud services routed through CarPlay and Android Auto, has proven both dependable and virtually seamless for some drivers.

A connected future with an expiration date

Cloud-based vehicle connectivity is growing. While only about half of the vehicles on the road today utilize the technology, industry experts predict that 90–95 percent of new vehicles will be Internet‑connected by 2030. Most vehicles, even those on the assembly line today, still rely on embedded modem-based hardware. That means they’ll all eventually face the same obsolescence challenges.

One proposed solution to the problem is modular software-defined architecture at the OE level, allowing consumers to physically swap hardware and upgrade software as technology advances. That welcome advancement would allow owners to upgrade their cloud-based connectivity and services rather than simply go dark.

186 Comments

sentences.zh: 基于云的服务允许制造商执行 OTA 软件更新，从而无需向经销商支付劳动密集型保修维修费用，例如软件相关的安全召回、错误修复和动力总成校准错误。

sentences.en: Instead of repairing one vehicle at a time, automakers can push updates to thousands of vehicles simultaneously.
sentences.zh: 汽车制造商可以同时向数千辆汽车推送更新，而不是一次修理一辆车。

sentences.en: Plus, they can offer “product improvements” to owners, including UX changes, ADAS refinements, and new software versions for infotainment apps long after the start of production.
sentences.zh: 此外，他们还可以在生产开始后很长时间内为车主提供“产品改进”，包括 UX 更改、ADAS 改进以及信息娱乐应用程序的新软件版本。

blocks.html_en: Vehicles require unique hardware for OTA and connected services, of course. The basic components of original equipment (OE) hardware in most passenger vehicles include a telematics box (TCU) with a 3G/4G/5G modem, a SIM/eSIM, and antennas—these comprise the “smartphone” component. There’s also a main onboard computer with flash memory and a boot system to install the new hardware (programmed to revert to early code if something goes wrong so the car doesn’t “brick” itself).

sentences.en: Vehicles require unique hardware for OTA and connected services, of course.
sentences.zh: 当然，车辆需要独特的硬件来实现 OTA 和互联服务。

sentences.en: The basic components of original equipment (OE) hardware in most passenger vehicles include a telematics box (TCU) with a 3G/4G/5G modem, a SIM/eSIM, and antennas—these comprise the “smartphone” component.
sentences.zh: 大多数乘用车原始设备 (OE) 硬件的基本组件包括带有 3G/4G/5G 调制解调器的远程信息处理盒 (TCU)、SIM/eSIM 和天线，这些组成了“智能手机”组件。

sentences.en: There’s also a main onboard computer with flash memory and a boot system to install the new hardware (programmed to revert to early code if something goes wrong so the car doesn’t “brick” itself).
sentences.zh: 还有一个带有闪存的主车载计算机和一个用于安装新硬件的启动系统（经过编程，如果出现问题，可以恢复到早期代码，这样汽车就不会“变砖”）。

blocks.html_en: The TCU/main computer is tasked with sending signals over the vehicle’s internal wiring (CAN/Ethernet) to various ECUs, which are engineered to accept updates. For everyone’s peace of mind, robust security measures must be put in place to ensure that only genuine factory software can be installed and that hackers are locked out.

sentences.en: The TCU/main computer is tasked with sending signals over the vehicle’s internal wiring (CAN/Ethernet) to various ECUs, which are engineered to accept updates.
sentences.zh: TCU/主计算机的任务是通过车辆内部线路（CAN/以太网）向各种 ECU 发送信号，这些 ECU 被设计为接受更新。

sentences.en: For everyone’s peace of mind, robust security measures must be put in place to ensure that only genuine factory software can be installed and that hackers are locked out.
sentences.zh: 为了让每个人都安心，必须采取强有力的安全措施，以确保只能安装正版工厂软件，并将黑客拒之门外。

blocks.html_en: Subscription costs aside, consumers are generally pleased with cloud-based services. Connectivity improves convenience, comfort, and safety, while OTA updates keep vehicles feeling fresh and up to date. Unfortunately, that honeymoon phase doesn’t last forever—over time, vehicle-cloud-based connected services are scaled back or, worse, shut off entirely.

sentences.en: Subscription costs aside, consumers are generally pleased with cloud-based services.
sentences.zh: 除了订阅成本之外，消费者普遍对基于云的服务感到满意。

sentences.en: Connectivity improves convenience, comfort, and safety, while OTA updates keep vehicles feeling fresh and up to date.
sentences.zh: 连接性提高了便利性、舒适性和安全性，而 OTA 更新则让车辆感觉新鲜和最新。

sentences.en: Unfortunately, that honeymoon phase doesn’t last forever—over time, vehicle-cloud-based connected services are scaled back or, worse, shut off entirely.
sentences.zh: 不幸的是，这种蜜月期不会永远持续下去——随着时间的推移，基于车辆云的互联服务会缩减，或者更糟糕的是完全关闭。

blocks.html_en: The day the signal dies

sentences.en: The day the signal dies
sentences.zh: 信号消失的那一天

blocks.html_en: There is no single event or element that triggers the end—it’s a combination of things. As vehicles age, OE on-board hardware becomes obsolete as cellular providers replace older technology and automakers stop investing in aging back-end stacks and features. Manufacturer contracts for connected services can also expire. Taken together, these factors mean that time ultimately kills cloud-based vehicle services.

sentences.en: There is no single event or element that triggers the end—it’s a combination of things.
sentences.zh: 没有任何单一事件或元素会触发结局——而是多种事物的组合。

sentences.en: As vehicles age, OE on-board hardware becomes obsolete as cellular providers replace older technology and automakers stop investing in aging back-end stacks and features.
sentences.zh: 随着车辆老化，随着蜂窝提供商更换旧技术以及汽车制造商停止投资老化的后端堆栈和功能，OE 车载硬件变得过时。

sentences.en: Manufacturer contracts for connected services can also expire.
sentences.zh: 互联服务的制造商合同也可能到期。

sentences.en: Taken together, these factors mean that time ultimately kills cloud-based vehicle services.
sentences.zh: 总而言之，这些因素意味着时间最终会扼杀基于云的车辆服务。

blocks.html_en: In 2022, many US cellular carriers, including AT&T, T‑Mobile/Sprint, and Verizon, shut down their 3G networks to create system capacity for upcoming 4G and 5G rollouts. When the 3G signal finally ceased, vehicles with the technology lost their connected cloud-based services (Porsche, Nissan, and Volkswagen were just a few of the automakers affected).

sentences.en: In 2022, many US cellular carriers, including AT&T, T‑Mobile/Sprint, and Verizon, shut down their 3G networks to create system capacity for upcoming 4G and 5G rollouts.
sentences.zh: 2022 年，包括 AT&T、T‑Mobile/Sprint 和 Verizon 在内的许多美国移动运营商将关闭其 3G 网络，为即将推出的 4G 和 5G 创造系统容量。

sentences.en: When the 3G signal finally ceased, vehicles with the technology lost their connected cloud-based services (Porsche, Nissan, and Volkswagen were just a few of the automakers affected).
sentences.zh: 当 3G 信号最终停止时，采用该技术的车辆失去了基于云的连接服务（保时捷、日产和大众只是受影响的几家汽车制造商）。

blocks.html_en: Lexus owners felt this shift acutely. The company’s Enform connectivity, which relied on the 3G network and was fitted to nearly all 2010–2017 models, went dark overnight because the hardware simply wasn’t forward‑compatible. (Lexus refunded owners for paid time left, while opportunistic dealers suggested that frustrated owners upgrade to a new Lexus that supported current technology.)

sentences.en: Lexus owners felt this shift acutely.
sentences.zh: 雷克萨斯车主敏锐地感受到了这种转变。

sentences.en: The company’s Enform connectivity, which relied on the 3G network and was fitted to nearly all 2010–2017 models, went dark overnight because the hardware simply wasn’t forward‑compatible.
sentences.zh: 该公司的 Enform 连接依赖于 3G 网络，几乎安装在所有 2010-2017 年的车型上，但由于硬件根本不向前兼容，一夜之间就停止了连接。

sentences.en: (Lexus refunded owners for paid time left, while opportunistic dealers suggested that frustrated owners upgrade to a new Lexus that supported current technology.)
sentences.zh: （雷克萨斯向车主退还剩余付费时间，而投机取巧的经销商建议沮丧的车主升级到支持当前技术的新雷克萨斯。）

blocks.html_en: Kia Connect.

sentences.en: Kia Connect.
sentences.zh: 起亚连接。

blocks.html_en: Credit: Kia

sentences.en: Credit: Kia
sentences.zh: 图片来源：起亚

sentences.en: Kia Connect.
sentences.zh: 起亚连接。

sentences.en: Credit: Kia
sentences.zh: 图片来源：起亚

blocks.html_en: Kia Connect. Credit: Kia

sentences.en: Kia Connect.
sentences.zh: 起亚连接。

sentences.en: Credit: Kia
sentences.zh: 图片来源：起亚

blocks.html_en: Last year, Acura announced that it would stop supporting vehicles with the older AcuraLink-backed stack and feature set, eliminating app-based remote access, service reminders, lock/unlock capabilities, “Find My Car,” and emergency call functions for many owners. The announcement itself was unremarkable, but many were stunned to learn that the technology was fitted to 2014–2022 models, including cars with current 4G hardware.

sentences.en: Last year, Acura announced that it would stop supporting vehicles with the older AcuraLink-backed stack and feature set, eliminating app-based remote access, service reminders, lock/unlock capabilities, “Find My Car,” and emergency call functions for many owners.
sentences.zh: 去年，讴歌宣布将停止支持具有旧版 AcuraLink 支持的堆栈和功能集的车辆，取消许多车主基于应用程序的远程访问、服务提醒、锁定/解锁功能、“查找我的车”和紧急呼叫功能。

sentences.en: The announcement itself was unremarkable, but many were stunned to learn that the technology was fitted to 2014–2022 models, including cars with current 4G hardware.
sentences.zh: 该公告本身并不引人注目，但许多人惊讶地发现该技术适用于 2014 年至 2022 年的车型，包括配备当前 4G 硬件的汽车。

blocks.html_en: Even though the vehicles and their modems could connect, Acura chose to stop supporting the old AcuraLink backend stack and feature set because the company determined it wasn’t worth it. Obsolescence was not an issue. (Acura provided prorated refunds to the relatively small number of customers still on paid plans but offered no retrofit path or migration for those vehicles that lost services.)

sentences.en: Even though the vehicles and their modems could connect, Acura chose to stop supporting the old AcuraLink backend stack and feature set because the company determined it wasn’t worth it.
sentences.zh: 尽管车辆及其调制解调器可以连接，但 Acura 选择停止支持旧的 AcuraLink 后端堆栈和功能集，因为该公司认为这不值得。

sentences.en: Obsolescence was not an issue.
sentences.zh: 过时不是问题。

sentences.en: (Acura provided prorated refunds to the relatively small number of customers still on paid plans but offered no retrofit path or migration for those vehicles that lost services.)
sentences.zh: （讴歌向相对少数仍在付费计划的客户提供按比例退款，但没有为那些失去服务的车辆提供改装路径或迁移。）

blocks.html_en: In early 2022, BMW ended ConnectedDrive/BMW Assist services for vehicles equipped with 3G telematics. As the end date neared, owners were not permitted to renew their contracts. That February, when the official stop date arrived, all 3G services were terminated, even for those with vehicle connectivity that functioned perfectly. (BMW provided selected owners with other complimentary services; some vehicles with 4G-capable telematics were offered an upgrade at no charge, but many simply lost connectivity altogether.)

sentences.en: In early 2022, BMW ended ConnectedDrive/BMW Assist services for vehicles equipped with 3G telematics.
sentences.zh: 2022 年初，宝马终止了为配备 3G 远程信息处理的车辆提供 ConnectedDrive/BMW Assist 服务。

sentences.en: As the end date neared, owners were not permitted to renew their contracts.
sentences.zh: 随着结束日期的临近，业主不得续签合同。

sentences.en: That February, when the official stop date arrived, all 3G services were terminated, even for those with vehicle connectivity that functioned perfectly.
sentences.zh: 那年 2 月，当官方停止日期到来时，所有 3G 服务都被终止，即使是那些车辆连接功能正常的服务也是如此。

sentences.en: (BMW provided selected owners with other complimentary services; some vehicles with 4G-capable telematics were offered an upgrade at no charge, but many simply lost connectivity altogether.)
sentences.zh: （宝马为选定的车主提供了其他免费服务；一些配备 4G 远程信息处理功能的车辆获得了免费升级，但许多车辆根本就完全失去了连接。）

blocks.html_en: Life after the shutdown

sentences.en: Life after the shutdown
sentences.zh: 停电后的生活

blocks.html_en: When cloud-based connectivity goes away, it’s more of an inconvenience than a disaster. While remote conveniences and safety services end, they don’t serve an important role in the vehicle’s daily mechanical operation, meaning the powertrain, climate control, and accessories continue to work.

sentences.en: When cloud-based connectivity goes away, it’s more of an inconvenience than a disaster.
sentences.zh: 当基于云的连接消失时，与其说是一场灾难，不如说是一种不便。

sentences.en: While remote conveniences and safety services end, they don’t serve an important role in the vehicle’s daily mechanical operation, meaning the powertrain, climate control, and accessories continue to work.
sentences.zh: 虽然远程便利和安全服务结束，但它们在车辆的日常机械操作中不再发挥重要作用，这意味着动力总成、气候控制和配件继续工作。

blocks.html_en: But what if you use those cloud-based features and need an alternative once the existing system shuts off? Thankfully, there are a handful of possibilities, including software/OTA updates, hardware/TCU replacements, aftermarket telematics and OBD devices, and smartphone apps to keep vehicles connected to the cloud.

sentences.en: But what if you use those cloud-based features and need an alternative once the existing system shuts off?
sentences.zh: 但是，如果您使用这些基于云的功能，并且在现有系统关闭后需要替代方案怎么办？

sentences.en: Thankfully, there are a handful of possibilities, including software/OTA updates, hardware/TCU replacements, aftermarket telematics and OBD devices, and smartphone apps to keep vehicles connected to the cloud.
sentences.zh: 值得庆幸的是，有很多可能性，包括软件/OTA 更新、硬件/TCU 更换、售后远程信息处理和 OBD 设备以及使车辆与云保持连接的智能手机应用程序。

blocks.html_en: Software/OTA updates are the easiest path to restore cloud services, but that assumes the vehicle has the proper hardware installed. Some 2017–2019 Genesis vehicles, including G80 and G90 models, used an SVLTE-type telematics system that could be upgraded with new software (the pure 3G-only units lost services when Verizon dropped its 3G network). Honda offered many customers free over-the-air software upgrades to 4G LTE in advance of AT&T’s cutoff. And GM brand owners, including those with Buick, Cadillac, Chevrolet, and GMC vehicles, were offered over-the-air software updates that preserved core OnStar services even after the first 3G network ceased.

sentences.en: Software/OTA updates are the easiest path to restore cloud services, but that assumes the vehicle has the proper hardware installed.
sentences.zh: 软件/OTA 更新是恢复云服务的最简单途径，但前提是车辆安装了正确的硬件。

sentences.en: Some 2017–2019 Genesis vehicles, including G80 and G90 models, used an SVLTE-type telematics system that could be upgraded with new software (the pure 3G-only units lost services when Verizon dropped its 3G network).
sentences.zh: 一些 2017-2019 年款 Genesis 车辆，包括 G80 和 G90 车型，使用了 SVLTE 型远程信息处理系统，可以通过新软件进行升级（当 Verizon 放弃其 3G 网络时，纯 3G 设备将失去服务）。

sentences.en: Honda offered many customers free over-the-air software upgrades to 4G LTE in advance of AT&T’s cutoff.
sentences.zh: 在 AT&T 切断服务之前，本田为许多客户提供了 4G LTE 的免费无线软件升级。

sentences.en: And GM brand owners, including those with Buick, Cadillac, Chevrolet, and GMC vehicles, were offered over-the-air software updates that preserved core OnStar services even after the first 3G network ceased.
sentences.zh: 通用汽车品牌所有者，包括拥有别克、凯迪拉克、雪佛兰和 GMC 车辆的品牌所有者，可以获得无线软件更新，即使在第一个 3G 网络停止后也能保留核心 OnStar 服务。

blocks.html_en: Things are a bit more complicated with hardware upgrades, as swapping out the physical telematics control unit typically requires a visit to the dealership. Many 2016–2018 Subaru models equipped with the brand’s Starlink Safety & Security required a new 4G network telematics Starlink data communication module (DCM) to keep cloud-based services running (the remedy was offered at no charge to eligible subscribers).

sentences.en: Things are a bit more complicated with hardware upgrades, as swapping out the physical telematics control unit typically requires a visit to the dealership.
sentences.zh: 硬件升级的事情有点复杂，因为更换物理远程信息处理控制单元通常需要访问经销商。

sentences.en: Many 2016–2018 Subaru models equipped with the brand’s Starlink Safety & Security required a new 4G network telematics Starlink data communication module (DCM) to keep cloud-based services running (the remedy was offered at no charge to eligible subscribers).
sentences.zh: 许多 2016-2018 款斯巴鲁车型配备了该品牌的 Starlink Safety & Security，需要新的 4G 网络远程信息处理 Starlink 数据通信模块 (DCM)，以保持基于云的服务运行（该补救措施是免费向符合条件的订户提供的）。

blocks.html_en: Nissan offered a $199 2G‑to‑3G TCU upgrade, which was partially subsidized by the manufacturer, for many 2011–2014 Leaf models but then offered the same upgrade to 2015 Leaf owners for free. BMW told i3 owners that no official technology upgrade was available, so owners took matters into their own hands and bought up-to-date 4G TCUs and paid to have them coded—this cost upward of $1,400 per vehicle.

sentences.en: Nissan offered a $199 2G‑to‑3G TCU upgrade, which was partially subsidized by the manufacturer, for many 2011–2014 Leaf models but then offered the same upgrade to 2015 Leaf owners for free.
sentences.zh: 日产为许多 2011-2014 年 Leaf 车型提供了 199 美元的 2G 至 3G TCU 升级，其中部分由制造商补贴，但随后向 2015 年 Leaf 车主免费提供相同的升级。

sentences.en: BMW told i3 owners that no official technology upgrade was available, so owners took matters into their own hands and bought up-to-date 4G TCUs and paid to have them coded—this cost upward of $1,400 per vehicle.
sentences.zh: 宝马告诉 i3 车主，没有可用的官方技术升级，因此车主自己解决问题，购买了最新的 4G TCU，并付费对其进行编码——每辆车的成本超过 1,400 美元。

blocks.html_en: Not all connected services are smartphone apps.

sentences.en: Not all connected services are smartphone apps.
sentences.zh: 并非所有联网服务都是智能手机应用程序。

blocks.html_en: Credit: Toyota

sentences.en: Credit: Toyota
sentences.zh: 图片来源：丰田

sentences.en: Not all connected services are smartphone apps.
sentences.zh: 并非所有联网服务都是智能手机应用程序。

sentences.en: Credit: Toyota
sentences.zh: 图片来源：丰田

blocks.html_en: Not all connected services are smartphone apps. Credit: Toyota

sentences.en: Not all connected services are smartphone apps.
sentences.zh: 并非所有联网服务都是智能手机应用程序。

sentences.en: Credit: Toyota
sentences.zh: 图片来源：丰田

blocks.html_en: Although less integrated with the vehicle’s systems, aftermarket telematics and diagnostic-port (OBD) solutions offer limited cloud connectivity to fill the gap left by OE services when they’re phased out. Unfortunately, most are engineered for fleet services—creating app-based trip logs, GPS tracking, driving-style scoring, and basic OBD fault-code data for remote monitoring and data logging. They’re effective in this role, but they generally can’t duplicate OEM functions such as remote lock/engine start, automatic crash notification, or SOS features because they sit on the OBD port rather than on the carmaker’s proprietary telematics stack.

sentences.en: Although less integrated with the vehicle’s systems, aftermarket telematics and diagnostic-port (OBD) solutions offer limited cloud connectivity to fill the gap left by OE services when they’re phased out.
sentences.zh: 尽管与车辆系统的集成度较低，但售后远程信息处理和诊断端口 (OBD) 解决方案提供有限的云连接，以填补 OE 服务逐步淘汰时留下的空白。

sentences.en: Unfortunately, most are engineered for fleet services—creating app-based trip logs, GPS tracking, driving-style scoring, and basic OBD fault-code data for remote monitoring and data logging.
sentences.zh: 不幸的是，大多数都是为车队服务而设计的——创建基于应用程序的行程日志、GPS 跟踪、驾驶风格评分以及用于远程监控和数据记录的基本 OBD 故障代码数据。

sentences.en: They’re effective in this role, but they generally can’t duplicate OEM functions such as remote lock/engine start, automatic crash notification, or SOS features because they sit on the OBD port rather than on the carmaker’s proprietary telematics stack.
sentences.zh: 它们在这个角色上很有效，但它们通常无法复制 OEM 功能，例如远程锁定/发动机启动、自动碰撞通知或 SOS 功能，因为它们位于 OBD 端口而不是汽车制造商专有的远程信息处理堆栈上。

blocks.html_en: When cloud-based connectivity services disappear, those who can’t update via software or hardware (or simply don’t want to pay subscription and fee costs) often adopt a simple handheld solution—they rely on their smartphone. Apple CarPlay and Android Auto have been cleanly integrated into nearly all the OE infotainment systems on the market for the past decade. Consumer acceptance is high, as the interactive screens duplicate smartphone interfaces, keeping the UI effortless. There are also regular OTA updates via the mobile subscribers’ 4G/5G service.

sentences.en: When cloud-based connectivity services disappear, those who can’t update via software or hardware (or simply don’t want to pay subscription and fee costs) often adopt a simple handheld solution—they rely on their smartphone.
sentences.zh: 当基于云的连接服务消失时，那些无法通过软件或硬件更新（或者只是不想支付订阅和费用）的人通常会采用简单的手持解决方案 - 他们依赖智能手机。

sentences.en: Apple CarPlay and Android Auto have been cleanly integrated into nearly all the OE infotainment systems on the market for the past decade.
sentences.zh: 在过去的十年里，Apple CarPlay 和 Android Auto 已经干净地集成到市场上几乎所有的 OE 信息娱乐系统中。

sentences.en: Consumer acceptance is high, as the interactive screens duplicate smartphone interfaces, keeping the UI effortless.
sentences.zh: 消费者接受度很高，因为交互式屏幕复制了智能手机界面，使用户界面保持轻松。

sentences.en: There are also regular OTA updates via the mobile subscribers’ 4G/5G service.
sentences.zh: 还通过移动用户的 4G/5G 服务定期进行 OTA 更新。

blocks.html_en: While remote lock/engine start and climate control preconditioning typically aren’t part of the Apple CarPlay and Android Auto equation, most smartphones offer some sort of crash‑detection and SOS functions, reincorporating some of the important safety features lost with OEM cloud-based systems. Mobile phones also offer Wi-Fi via mobile hotspots, adding another useful feature. Phone-driven connectivity, with cloud services routed through CarPlay and Android Auto, has proven both dependable and virtually seamless for some drivers.

sentences.en: While remote lock/engine start and climate control preconditioning typically aren’t part of the Apple CarPlay and Android Auto equation, most smartphones offer some sort of crash‑detection and SOS functions, reincorporating some of the important safety features lost with OEM cloud-based systems.
sentences.zh: 虽然远程锁定/发动机启动和气候控制预处理通常不属于 Apple CarPlay 和 Android Auto 等式的一部分，但大多数智能手机都提供某种碰撞检测和 SOS 功能，重新整合了 OEM 云系统所失去的一些重要安全功能。

sentences.en: Mobile phones also offer Wi-Fi via mobile hotspots, adding another useful feature.
sentences.zh: 手机还可以通过移动热点提供 Wi-Fi，从而增加了另一个有用的功能。

sentences.en: Phone-driven connectivity, with cloud services routed through CarPlay and Android Auto, has proven both dependable and virtually seamless for some drivers.
sentences.zh: 事实证明，电话驱动的连接以及通过 CarPlay 和 Android Auto 路由的云服务对于某些驾驶员来说既可靠又几乎无缝。

blocks.html_en: A connected future with an expiration date

sentences.en: A connected future with an expiration date
sentences.zh: 一个有期限的互联未来

blocks.html_en: Cloud-based vehicle connectivity is growing. While only about half of the vehicles on the road today utilize the technology, industry experts predict that 90–95 percent of new vehicles will be Internet‑connected by 2030. Most vehicles, even those on the assembly line today, still rely on embedded modem-based hardware. That means they’ll all eventually face the same obsolescence challenges.

sentences.en: Cloud-based vehicle connectivity is growing.
sentences.zh: 基于云的车辆连接正在增长。

sentences.en: While only about half of the vehicles on the road today utilize the technology, industry experts predict that 90–95 percent of new vehicles will be Internet‑connected by 2030.
sentences.zh: 虽然目前道路上只有约一半的车辆使用该技术，但行业专家预测，到 2030 年，90-95% 的新车将实现联网。

sentences.en: Most vehicles, even those on the assembly line today, still rely on embedded modem-based hardware.
sentences.zh: 大多数车辆，甚至是当今装配线上的车辆，仍然依赖基于嵌入式调制解调器的硬件。

sentences.en: That means they’ll all eventually face the same obsolescence challenges.
sentences.zh: 这意味着它们最终都会面临同样的过时挑战。

blocks.html_en: One proposed solution to the problem is modular software-defined architecture at the OE level, allowing consumers to physically swap hardware and upgrade software as technology advances. That welcome advancement would allow owners to upgrade their cloud-based connectivity and services rather than simply go dark.

sentences.en: One proposed solution to the problem is modular software-defined architecture at the OE level, allowing consumers to physically swap hardware and upgrade software as technology advances.
sentences.zh: 针对该问题提出的一种解决方案是 OE 级别的模块化软件定义架构，允许消费者随着技术的进步物理交换硬件并升级软件。

sentences.en: That welcome advancement would allow owners to upgrade their cloud-based connectivity and services rather than simply go dark.
sentences.zh: 这一令人欢迎的进步将允许业主升级其基于云的连接和服务，而不是简单地关闭。

content_html_zh:
☁️🚗

汽车制造商喜欢联网汽车，但支持并不是无限期的。

图片来源：Aurich Lawson |盖蒂图片社

图片来源：Aurich Lawson |盖蒂图片社

您是否使用车辆的应用程序在炎热的天气里预冷驾驶室，确认车门已锁好，或者让汽车在安全气囊弹出时自动呼救？

尽可能地享受那些基于云的互联便利——它们已经过时了。 在短短几年内，您驾驶今天的车辆可能会失去您目前喜欢的许多功能。

我们是如何迷上云的

“互联服务”——基于云的网络功能，让车辆与外部系统通信，向驾驶员和乘客提供应用程序、数据和远程功能——自 20 世纪 90 年代以来就已经存在，当时通用汽车推出了 OnStar 作为一个选项。 这些早期的系统大多以语音为中心，但它们仍然依赖于集中式后端系统。 现代版本完全由数据驱动和云托管，使用更复杂的无线数据链路来提供更好的功能集。

如今，几乎每个品牌都提供某种形式的基于云的远程信息处理或互联服务堆栈。 它们可以深度嵌入，并且大多数都完全集成为现代车辆连接的核心，支持车辆的无线 (OTA) 更新以及为车主提供基于应用程序的服务。 在通用汽车庆祝 OnStar 服务超过 30 周年之际，已有十几家汽车制造商加入其中，每家汽车制造商都推出了自己独特的服务。 HondaLink、雷克萨斯 Enform、FordPass、BMW ConnectedDrive、Volvo On Call 和 Porsche Connect 只是其中的几个例子。

尽管它们的营销名称很吸引人，但这些系统在功能上都很相似——每个系统都提供了非常相似的功能集。 基础功能包括远程锁定/启动、车辆状态和维护更新、定位和跟踪以及紧急援助。 其他高级功能包括车内 Wi-Fi 热点、车厢预处理、被盗车辆跟踪服务和礼宾服务。

许多消费者已经接受了远程便利，并向汽车制造商表明他们非常愿意为此付费。 新车交付后捆绑“免费试用”后，制造商收取月费或联网服务订阅费。 通用汽车表示，40%的OnStar客户在介绍期结束后选择续订。

为什么汽车制造商喜欢联网汽车

当然，原始设备制造商也能从中获益。 基于云的服务允许制造商执行 OTA 软件更新，从而无需向经销商支付劳动密集型保修维修费用，例如软件相关的安全召回、错误修复和动力总成校准错误。 汽车制造商可以同时向数千辆汽车推送更新，而不是一次修理一辆车。 此外，他们还可以在生产开始后很长时间内为车主提供“产品改进”，包括 UX 更改、ADAS 改进以及信息娱乐应用程序的新软件版本。

当然，车辆需要独特的硬件来实现 OTA 和互联服务。 大多数乘用车原始设备 (OE) 硬件的基本组件包括带有 3G/4G/5G 调制解调器的远程信息处理盒 (TCU)、SIM/eSIM 和天线，这些组成了“智能手机”组件。 还有一个带有闪存的主车载计算机和一个用于安装新硬件的启动系统（经过编程，如果出现问题，可以恢复到早期代码，这样汽车就不会“变砖”）。

TCU/主计算机的任务是通过车辆内部线路（CAN/以太网）向各种 ECU 发送信号，这些 ECU 被设计为接受更新。 为了让每个人都安心，必须采取强有力的安全措施，以确保只能安装正版工厂软件，并将黑客拒之门外。

除了订阅成本之外，消费者普遍对基于云的服务感到满意。 连接性提高了便利性、舒适性和安全性，而 OTA 更新则让车辆感觉新鲜和最新。 不幸的是，这种蜜月期不会永远持续下去——随着时间的推移，基于车辆云的互联服务会缩减，或者更糟糕的是完全关闭。

信号消失的那一天

没有任何单一事件或元素会触发结局——而是多种事物的组合。 随着车辆老化，随着蜂窝提供商更换旧技术以及汽车制造商停止投资老化的后端堆栈和功能，OE 车载硬件变得过时。 互联服务的制造商合同也可能到期。 总而言之，这些因素意味着时间最终会扼杀基于云的车辆服务。

2022 年，包括 AT&T、T‑Mobile/Sprint 和 Verizon 在内的许多美国移动运营商将关闭其 3G 网络，为即将推出的 4G 和 5G 创造系统容量。 当 3G 信号最终停止时，采用该技术的车辆失去了基于云的连接服务（保时捷、日产和大众只是受影响的几家汽车制造商）。

雷克萨斯车主敏锐地感受到了这种转变。 该公司的 Enform 连接依赖于 3G 网络，几乎安装在所有 2010-2017 年的车型上，但由于硬件根本不向前兼容，一夜之间就停止了连接。 （雷克萨斯向车主退还剩余付费时间，而投机取巧的经销商建议沮丧的车主升级到支持当前技术的新雷克萨斯。）

去年，讴歌宣布将停止支持具有旧版 AcuraLink 支持的堆栈和功能集的车辆，取消许多车主基于应用程序的远程访问、服务提醒、锁定/解锁功能、“查找我的车”和紧急呼叫功能。 该公告本身并不引人注目，但许多人惊讶地发现该技术适用于 2014 年至 2022 年的车型，包括配备当前 4G 硬件的汽车。

尽管车辆及其调制解调器可以连接，但 Acura 选择停止支持旧的 AcuraLink 后端堆栈和功能集，因为该公司认为这不值得。 过时不是问题。 （讴歌向相对少数仍在付费计划的客户提供按比例退款，但没有为那些失去服务的车辆提供改装路径或迁移。）

2022 年初，宝马终止了为配备 3G 远程信息处理的车辆提供 ConnectedDrive/BMW Assist 服务。 随着结束日期的临近，业主不得续签合同。 那年 2 月，当官方停止日期到来时，所有 3G 服务都被终止，即使是那些车辆连接功能正常的服务也是如此。 （宝马为选定的车主提供了其他免费服务；一些配备 4G 远程信息处理功能的车辆获得了免费升级，但许多车辆根本就完全失去了连接。）

停电后的生活

当基于云的连接消失时，与其说是一场灾难，不如说是一种不便。 虽然远程便利和安全服务结束，但它们在车辆的日常机械操作中不再发挥重要作用，这意味着动力总成、气候控制和配件继续工作。

但是，如果您使用这些基于云的功能，并且在现有系统关闭后需要替代方案怎么办？ 值得庆幸的是，有很多可能性，包括软件/OTA 更新、硬件/TCU 更换、售后远程信息处理和 OBD 设备以及使车辆与云保持连接的智能手机应用程序。

软件/OTA 更新是恢复云服务的最简单途径，但前提是车辆安装了正确的硬件。 一些 2017-2019 年款 Genesis 车辆，包括 G80 和 G90 车型，使用了 SVLTE 型远程信息处理系统，可以通过新软件进行升级（当 Verizon 放弃其 3G 网络时，纯 3G 设备将失去服务）。 在 AT&T 切断服务之前，本田为许多客户提供了 4G LTE 的免费无线软件升级。 通用汽车品牌所有者，包括拥有别克、凯迪拉克、雪佛兰和 GMC 车辆的品牌所有者，可以获得无线软件更新，即使在第一个 3G 网络停止后也能保留核心 OnStar 服务。

硬件升级的事情有点复杂，因为更换物理远程信息处理控制单元通常需要访问经销商。 许多 2016-2018 款斯巴鲁车型配备了该品牌的 Starlink Safety & Security，需要新的 4G 网络远程信息处理 Starlink 数据通信模块 (DCM)，以保持基于云的服务运行（该补救措施是免费向符合条件的订户提供的）。

日产为许多 2011-2014 年 Leaf 车型提供了 199 美元的 2G 至 3G TCU 升级，其中部分由制造商补贴，但随后向 2015 年 Leaf 车主免费提供相同的升级。 宝马告诉 i3 车主，没有可用的官方技术升级，因此车主自己解决问题，购买了最新的 4G TCU，并付费对其进行编码——每辆车的成本超过 1,400 美元。

尽管与车辆系统的集成度较低，但售后远程信息处理和诊断端口 (OBD) 解决方案提供有限的云连接，以填补 OE 服务逐步淘汰时留下的空白。 不幸的是，大多数都是为车队服务而设计的——创建基于应用程序的行程日志、GPS 跟踪、驾驶风格评分以及用于远程监控和数据记录的基本 OBD 故障代码数据。 它们在这个角色上很有效，但它们通常无法复制 OEM 功能，例如远程锁定/发动机启动、自动碰撞通知或 SOS 功能，因为它们位于 OBD 端口而不是汽车制造商专有的远程信息处理堆栈上。

当基于云的连接服务消失时，那些无法通过软件或硬件更新（或者只是不想支付订阅和费用）的人通常会采用简单的手持解决方案 - 他们依赖智能手机。 在过去的十年里，Apple CarPlay 和 Android Auto 已经干净地集成到市场上几乎所有的 OE 信息娱乐系统中。 消费者接受度很高，因为交互式屏幕复制了智能手机界面，使用户界面保持轻松。 还通过移动用户的 4G/5G 服务定期进行 OTA 更新。

虽然远程锁定/发动机启动和气候控制预处理通常不属于 Apple CarPlay 和 Android Auto 等式的一部分，但大多数智能手机都提供某种碰撞检测和 SOS 功能，重新整合了 OEM 云系统所失去的一些重要安全功能。 手机还可以通过移动热点提供 Wi-Fi，从而增加了另一个有用的功能。 事实证明，电话驱动的连接以及通过 CarPlay 和 Android Auto 路由的云服务对于某些驾驶员来说既可靠又几乎无缝。

一个有期限的互联未来

基于云的车辆连接正在增长。 虽然目前道路上只有约一半的车辆使用该技术，但行业专家预测，到 2030 年，90-95% 的新车将实现联网。 大多数车辆，甚至是当今装配线上的车辆，仍然依赖基于嵌入式调制解调器的硬件。 这意味着它们最终都会面临同样的过时挑战。

针对该问题提出的一种解决方案是 OE 级别的模块化软件定义架构，允许消费者随着技术的进步物理交换硬件并升级软件。 这一令人欢迎的进步将允许业主升级其基于云的连接和服务，而不是简单地关闭。

186 条评论
